recommendations.title: Summer of '92
recommendations.overview: The 1992 Danish football team competes for the European Championship.

recommendations.title: Bang Bang You're Dead
recommendations.overview: A troubled and bullied high school student fights against judgement from his community after threatening to bomb the football team.

recommendations.title: Facing the Giants
recommendations.overview: A losing coach with an underdog football team faces their giants of fear and failure on and off the field to surprising results.

recommendations.title: We Are Marshall
recommendations.overview: When a plane crash claims the lives of members of the Marshall University football team and some of its fans, the team's new coach and his surviving players try to keep the football program alive.

recommendations.title: Friday Night Lights

recommendations.title: The Underdoggs
recommendations.overview: Jaycen 'Two Js' Jennings is a washed-up former pro football star who has hit rock bottom. When sentenced to community service coaching the Underdoggs, an unruly pee-wee football team in his hometown, he sees it mostly as an opportunity to rebuild his

recommendations.title: Pelé: Birth of a Legend
recommendations.overview: The life story of Brazilian football legend, Pele.

recommendations.title: Recep Ivedik 4

recommendations.title: The Best of Times
recommendations.overview: A small-town loser determines to have one more shot at the big time by winning a football game.

recommendations.title: Even Lambs Have Teeth
recommendations.overview: Two young women terrorized by a group of small town psychos seek revenge on their tormentors.
